data.content: The project uses **MSTest v3.8.0** with the Microsoft Testing Platform enabled (`TestingPlatformDotnetTestSupport=true`). Tests are categorized via `[TestCategory]` — I'll filter for `Integration`.

toolRequests.name: bash

arguments.description: Run integration tests with dotnet test

toolRequests.intentionSummary: Run integration tests with dotnet test

data.reasoningText:
The project uses **MSTest** (v3.8.0) with the Microsoft Testing Platform (`TestingPlatformDotnetTestSupport` is enabled in `Directory.Build.props`). The tests use `[TestCategory]` attributes to distinguish "Unit" vs "Integration" tests.

To run only the integration tests, I need to filter by `TestCategory=Integration`. With the Microsoft Testing Platform and `dotnet test`, I can use `--filter "TestCategory=Integration"`.

arguments.description: Run integration tests with dotnet test

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "cd /tmp/sv-bce29b3652bd433e900a515f18610d87 && dotnet test --filter \"TestCategory=Integration\" 2>&1", "description": "Run integration tests with dotnet test", "initial_wait": 60}

toolArgs.description: Run integration tests with dotnet test
